title: NHS: Anxiety in children
summary: Parent-facing overview of anxiety in children, including signs, support ideas, and routes to more help.

title: NHS: Anxiety disorders in children
summary: Explains when anxiety may be affecting day-to-day life enough to need professional help.

title: NICE CG159: Social anxiety disorder
summary: Clinical guideline covering recognition, assessment, and treatment of social anxiety disorder in children, young people, and adults. Last reviewed by NICE in May 2024.

title: YoungMinds: School anxiety and refusal
summary: Practical parent guide on school anxiety, emotionally based school avoidance language, home strategies, school changes, and return-to-school support.

title: Anna Freud: School attendance and mental wellbeing
summary: School-focused resource on the relationship between mental wellbeing and reduced or non-attendance.

title: Department for Education: Mental health resources
summary: Government collection of mental health resources for children, young people, parents, carers, schools, and colleges. Updated March 2024.

title: NHS: Urgent help for mental health
summary: How to get immediate expert advice and assessment for a mental health crisis or emergency.

title: NHS: Where to get help for self-harm
summary: NHS advice on getting support for self-harm or thoughts of self-harm, including urgent help signposting.

title: Mind: Mental health helplines
summary: Directory of UK mental health helplines, including suicide prevention and crisis text options.

title: NHS: Cyclical vomiting syndrome
summary: Includes urgent red-flag vomiting symptoms that require emergency assessment. Useful as a safety reference for nausea/vomiting tracking.

title: IPSEA: School anxiety
summary: Education rights charity page on school anxiety, SEN links, and the importance of seeking help early when anxiety worsens attendance.
